case_title: YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. VS. PACIFIC MONARCH LIMITED

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC MONARCH LIMITED $576.58 PRINCIPAL, $119.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $695.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC MONARCH LIMITED $576.58 PRINCIPAL, $189.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $765.58, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF ONE-HALF OF THE COST OF REPAIR AND LOSS OF USE LESS $136.00 FOR UNEXPLAINED "ADDTIONAL COSTS AND OPERATIONS". DAMAGES REDUCED DUE TO CONTRIBTORY NEGLIGENCE ON THE PART OF THE DRIVER OF THE TAXI. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
